questions.question: What causes a hydration mismatch when using Date.now() in a template?
options: Date.now() is not available in Node.js
The server and client render at different times, producing different values
Vue SSR serializes dates as strings, causing a type mismatch
Date.now() triggers an async operation that Suspense cannot handle

questions.question: What attribute was introduced in Vue 3.5 to suppress intentional hydration mismatches?
